phase_history.notes: Defined Nova Heat as a premium harmonic saturation engine focused on warmth, presence, glue, and controlled color for vocals and mixes.
Planned a five-knob saturation workflow with Drive, Tone, Heat, Mix, Output, plus Tube/Tape/Analog/Digital character modes and a Nova-family WebView UI.
Created the first Nova Heat UI specification, style guide, and interactive WebView mockup with Input Drive, Tone Shaping, Output metering, and bottom preset buttons.

framework_selection.rationale: WebView is the best fit for Nova Heat because it should match the premium boutique Nova family aesthetic with a polished champagne-and-gold hardware UI, preset buttons, and tactile control presentation.
